summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The hydrated artifact shows no security-sensitive job refs, no shared canonical, and no allowed merge/fix/raise_pr path. Hydrated open PRs are kept as independent review/backlog items; refs missing from the preflight artifact are scoped needs_human because live target_updated_at was unavailable.
